Welcome to aha, your platform for powerful Telugu and Tamil stories, now offering even more content to explore.

aha consolidates the best of Telugu and Tamil movies and shows into a single OTT app, simplifying content discovery while enriching your viewing experience. Whether you enjoy emotional dramas, popular entertainment, gripping reality shows, or original series, aha helps you find stories that resonate with your language preferences.

This platform is designed with viewers in mind. Telugu and Tamil storytelling now coexist to expand your access without altering your viewing habits. Your language preferences remain unchanged, giving you full control over what you watch and how you enjoy it.

With aha, you can:
•	Watch Telugu and Tamil movies and original series in one app
•	Discover more popular Telugu & Tamil together entertainment effortlessly
•	Experience a unified OTT platform without compromising your language choices
•	Explore regional stories across genres and generations in greater depth

aha believes that local stories are most impactful when told with care and cultural depth. By integrating Telugu and Tamil worlds, aha broadens the concept of “local,” while remaining proudly rooted in its cultural origins.

This update emphasizes more stories, more choices, and no compromises. It is an evolution designed to help audiences discover content they might not have encountered before, without sacrificing familiarity or comfort.

From the latest movies to beloved classics, from innovative originals to fan-favorite non-fiction formats, aha continues to celebrate the richness of Telugu and Tamil storytelling. Every feature aims to facilitate easier discovery, smoother navigation, and a more enjoyable viewing experience.

If you want to watch Telugu and Tamil movies, explore Telugu and Tamil non-fiction entertainment, or use a trusted OTT app that prioritizes regional pride, aha is your destination.
•	More stories, No Compromise.
•	Same homegrown Soul.
•	Entertainment that truly speaks your language.

reviews.author: Manish QA
reviews.title: To QA Team of aha
reviews.text:
Dear QA Team of Aha, please review the below issues and request your tech team to make the below betterments and try to enhance the application better.

Device Tested: iPhone 11

Defect ID: D-001

Title: Forward button (10 sec) not visually displaying properly
Description:
When tapping the 10-second forward button while playing a video, the UI display is not visually clear. The button animation/indicator does not give a proper forward effect, leading to a poor user experience.

Steps to Reproduce:
	1.	Open the application on iPhone 11.
	2.	Play any video.
	3.	Tap the 10s forward button.

Expected Result:
The video should move forward by 10 seconds and the UI should clearly indicate the forward action.

Actual Result:
The forward action is performed, but the UI is visually unclear and does not provide proper feedback.

Severity: Low
Priority: Medium

⸻

Defect ID: D-002

Title: Unable to forward video beyond 20 seconds; background stream continues
Description:
When attempting to forward a video for more than 20 seconds, the stream does not behave as expected. Instead of resuming from the forwarded position (e.g., +10s from current timestamp), the video continues streaming in the background. This creates confusion as playback behavior is inconsistent. Issue has been observed repeatedly over the past few months.

Steps to Reproduce:
	1.	Open the application on iPhone 11.
	2.	Play any video.
	3.	Continuously tap the forward button to skip more than 20 seconds.

Expected Result:
The video should pause streaming and resume from the new forwarded timestamp.

Actual Result:
The video continues to stream in the background without resuming properly from the forwarded position.

Severity: High
Priority: High

⸻

Defect ID: D-003

Title: Rewind/Forward buttons become disabled after multiple clicks; stream continues in background
Description:
When attempting to rewind a video to an earlier timestamp (e.g., from 17:40 back to 16:20), the rewind and forward buttons become disabled after 2 clicks. Although the video stream continues to play in the background, the user loses control over navigation, causing confusion.

Steps to Reproduce:
	1.	Open the application on iPhone 11.
	2.	Play a video and go to a later point (e.g., 17:40).
	3.	Attempt to rewind back to 16:20 by clicking the rewind button multiple times.

Expected Result:
The video should rewind smoothly to the selected timestamp, and controls should remain active.

Actual Result:
After 2 clicks, the rewind/forward buttons become disabled while the video continues streaming in the background.

Severity: High
Priority: High

⸻

Defect ID: D-004

Title: Application response time is laggy during video playback
Description:
The application shows noticeable lag while playing videos. The response time for user actions (play, pause, forward, rewind) is delayed, leading to an unsmooth playback experience.

Steps to Reproduce:
	1.	Open the application on iPhone 11.
	2.	Play any video.
	3.	Interact with playback controls (play, pause, forward, rewind).

Expected Result:
The application should respond instantly to user actions, providing smooth playback.

Actual Result:
The application is slow to respond, resulting in lag and poor user experience.

Severity: High
Priority: High

reviews.author: xbacon29x
reviews.title: Disappointing Experience Despite Paid Subscription
reviews.text:
Nagbabayad kami para sa app na ito kaya inaasahan namin na maayos at maaasahan ang serbisyo. Sa kasamaang-palad, marami pa ring problema sa paggamit ng PilipinasLive.

Una, madalas na black screen ang coverage kahit na live ang event. Minsan naman ay sobrang bagal o lag ang app, kaya napuputol o hindi tuloy-tuloy ang panonood. Nakakadismaya ito lalo na kung live game ang pinapanood.

Isa pang problema ay kahit naka-off na ang ibang device o naka-logout na, lumalabas pa rin ang notification na may multiple accounts na naka-open, kaya hindi makapanood nang maayos. Mukhang may issue sa system ng pag-detect ng active sessions.

Bukod pa dito, may mga pagkakataon na bigla kang ginagawang inactive kahit nanonood ka lang, kaya napuputol ang stream at kailangan pang i-refresh o mag-login ulit.

Dahil may bayad ang subscription, sana ay maayos ng developers ang mga problemang ito—lalo na ang black screen, lagging, at account detection issues. Malaki ang potential ng app, pero kailangan pa ng improvements para maging sulit ang binabayad ng mga users.

raw.title: Pilipinas Live
raw.description:
Watch live games, catch up on highlights, news and exclusive videos from top sports leagues in the Philippines. Subscribe for premium access to enjoy all the action from anywhere on any digital screen.

KEY FEATURES:
● Live and Upcoming Filipino Sports Content: Discover the ultimate Filipino sports content with our live and upcoming games, so you can catch up on the go.

● Enjoy live games tailored to your preferences: Delve into the complete game experience, including extended pre and post-game coverage; Watch with multiple screens, granting you the ability to witness extraordinary plays
from various camera angles; Gain fresh insights from special hosts and distinguished guests who provide unique perspectives on the game, while also having the opportunity to share your own opinions.

● Have control on how you watch the game: Pause, restart, or rewinding live and on demand content to make sure you do not miss a thing.

● Personalized Experience: Build your own list of favorite games and leagues and sign up for even more benefits to personalize your viewing experience.

● Stay informed and share your reactions: Get the latest sports news, scores, stats, and standings and share your comments and reactions with the available interactive features, and more.

raw.description:
Unifi TV app is home to live channels and 20 streaming apps like Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, Max, Viu and more. FREE download, FREE registration – just use your mobile number (available for everyone in Malaysia!).​

If you’re a Unifi TV customer, link your Unifi TV account (example@iptv) to unlock all your entitlements.​

Here are some of the perks you can enjoy:​
- Enjoy sample basic channels with no strings attached. When you're ready for more, explore our attractive channel packs​
- View and access your favourite shows & movies across all channels and streaming apps.​
- Watch the latest blockbuster movies, fresh from the cinema, on U PICK​.
- Create multiple profiles – because who likes their algorithms being messed up?​
- Download on multiple devices – iPhone and iPad. (If your device isn't compatible, maybe it’s time for an upgrade? Just kidding!)​

What to watch, you say? Here’s our award-winning list: ​
- Blockbuster movies​
- Exclusive Unifi TV Originals series & movies​
- Express drama series & reality shows​
- Live sports action​
- Cartoons & animation​
- Documentaries & lifestyle programmes​
- 24/7 global news coverage​

Best viewed over a Wi-Fi connection. Mobile operator charges may apply.​
Content rights for the Unifi TV app are limited to use within Malaysia.​

We welcome any questions, comments or suggestions at help@unifi.com.my.​
Follow Unifi on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and X. Visit www.unifi.com.my/tv for the latest info and promotions.

raw.description: Unifi TV app is home to live channels and 20 streaming apps like Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, Max, Viu and more. FREE download, FREE registration – just use your mobile number (available for everyone in Malaysia!). If you’re a Unifi TV customer, link your Unifi TV account (example@iptv) to unlock all your entitlements. Here are some of the perks you can enjoy: • No strings attached to sample basic channels. When you’re ready for more, check out our attractive packs. • View and access your favourite shows & movies across all channels and streaming apps. • Rent the latest blockbuster movies straight from the cinema on U PICK. • Create multiple profiles – because who likes their algorithms being messed up? • Download on multiple devices – mobile, tablets, Android TV boxes and smart TVs. (If your device isn't compatible, maybe it’s time for an upgrade? Just kidding!) What to watch, you say? Here’s our award-winning list: ​ • Blockbuster movies • Exclusive Unifi TV Originals series & movies • Express drama series & reality shows • Live sports action • Cartoons & animation • Documentaries & lifestyle programmes • 24/7 global news coverage Best viewed over a Wi-Fi connection. Mobile operator charges may apply.​ Content rights for the Unifi TV app are limited to use within Malaysia. We welcome any questions, comments or suggestions at help@unifi.com.my.​ Follow Unifi on Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and X. Visit www.unifi.com.my/tv for the latest info and promotions. ​

Unifi TV app is home to live channels and 20 streaming apps like Netflix, Disney+ Hotstar, Max, Viu and more. FREE download, FREE registration – just use your mobile number (available for everyone in Malaysia!).

If you’re a Unifi TV customer, link your Unifi TV account (example@iptv) to unlock all your entitlements.

Here are some of the perks you can enjoy:
• No strings attached to sample basic channels. When you’re ready for more, check out our attractive packs.

• Create multiple profiles – because who likes their algorithms being messed up?

What to watch, you say? Here’s our award-winning list: ​

Best viewed over a Wi-Fi connection. Mobile operator charges may apply.​

We welcome any questions, comments or suggestions at help@unifi.com.my.​

raw.description:
THE BEST IN ENTERTAINMENT, NEWS AND SPORTS IN SPANISH
All the live programming of Univision and UniMás and more live and on demand at your fingertips. You can access the Univision app with most TV services, including Comcast Xfinity, DirecTV, Dish, Spectrum, AT&T, Verizon FIOS, and others. 


Watch your way
• ​ If you missed your favorite shows on Univision, Unimás, Galavisión and TUDN, now you can watch them on demand, one day after they are broadcast.

• Watch all the Univision channels already included in your cable package, including Univision, UniMás, TUDN, and Galavisión,  Noticias 24/7, Zona TUDN and Canal ViX

• You can watch live and on demand at home or on your laptops.

• Log in with your TV provider to get access to the entire catalog of live and on demand content

• Watch live programming from up to three days ago using the automatic DVR feature.

• Don't you have television service? Try a subscription to the Univision Now app.

Access all your favorite shows:
• Current Novelas 
• Classic Novelas
• El Gordo y la Flaca
• Despierta America
• Noticiero Univision

Exclusive rights to football matches
• Liga MX
• UEFA Champions League
• Mexican and US National soccer teams

You will have at your fingertips all the live programming from Univision and UniMás live and on demand. You can access the Univision app with most TV services, including Comcast Xfinity, DirecTV, Dish, Spectrum, AT&T, Verizon FIOS, and others. 

How, when and where you want
• If you missed your favorite shows on Univision, UniMás, Galavisión and TUDN, now you can watch them on demand, one day after they broadcast.

• Watch all Univision channels already included in your cable package, including Univision, UniMás, TUDN, and Galavisión, Noticias 24/7, Zona TUDN and Canal ViX

• You can watch live and on demand at home or on your laptops.

• Sign in with your TV provider to get access to the entire catalog of live and​ on demand content.​

• Use any device, including your TV or mobile, at home, with Roku, Chromecast, Apple TV and Android TV

• Rewind programming from up to three days ago with the automatic DVR feature.

• Don't have television service? Try a subscription to the Univision Now app.

Access all our favorite shows:
• Current novels 
• Classic novels

SERIES ORIGINALES de todos los géneros, incluyendo Secretos de Villanas y Secretos de las Indomables, con la participación de estrellas icónicas de la televisión como Gaby Spanic, Laura Zapata, Cynthia Klitbo, Aylin Mujica, Sabine Moussier, Geraldine Bazán, Sarah Mintz, Yuri, Alicia Machado, Ninel Conde, Amara ‘La Negra’, Patricia Manterola y Zuleyka Rivera.

CANALES EN VIVO siempre disponibles y dedicados a diferentes géneros y entretenimiento, seguro encuentras un canal para ti.

PELÍCULAS Originales como Mi Perfecto Ex con Marjorie de Sousa y Mark Tacher; Cazadoras de Millonarios con Alicia Machado y Sherlyn. Clásicos del Cine de Oro como La Devoradora con María Félix; Me He de Comer Esa Tuna con Jorge Negrete; y Sor Tequila con La India María. Y lo mejor de Hollywood para todos los gustos: acción, comedia, romance, drama y más.

TELENOVELAS desde las que marcaron toda una época hasta los más recientes éxitos. Novelas Turcas como Hercai, Infieles, El Secreto de Feriha y Me Robó Mi Vida, y telenovelas latinas como: Mirada de Mujer, Gata Salvaje y Eva Luna.

CANELA MUSIC con videos musicales, shows originales, entrevistas y mixtapes seleccionados con los mejores videos de la música latina.

CANELA DEPORTES te trae los mejores análisis deportivos con 100% Futbol y El Dugout; Historias de Leyendas y One on One, con entrevistas a grandes figuras como el Pibe Valderrama, Óscar Córdoba, Javier Zanetti y más. Además, disfruta de MASL y canales en vivo.

CANELA KIDS te ofrece contenido infantil y 100% en español. Disfruta shows originales como Plaza Aventuras, SúperEllas y StoryBook, además de éxitos donde los pequeños aprenden jugando, como Barbie Dreamtopia, El Mundo de Ryan, Hola Romi y Love Diana.

¿Qué puedes hacer dentro de Canela.TV?

- Disfrutar de todo el contenido disponible con acceso 100% gratuito.
- Filtrar contenido para encontrar justo lo que quieres ver.
- Recibir notificaciones personalizadas para seguir descubriendo más entretenimiento.
- Recibir recomendaciones personalizadas alineadas a tus gustos.
- Guardar tu contenido favorito.
- Recibir acceso anticipado a contenido exclusivo.
- Controlar el acceso a contenido que ven tus hijos.
- Si eres parte de Club Canela, podrás ganar puntos por ver tu contenido favorito, que puedes cambiar por contenido exclusivo, entradas a sorteos y nuevas sorpresas todo el tiempo; además podrás completar divertidos retos y trivias que te harán ganar puntos extras.
